description: NOTE: commercial fields on this entity (agreedPrice, taxAmount, lineValue) are hiddenForRoles ["quality"] per axiom A17. A single ordered line on a PurchaseOrder: one item (or free-text service deliverable) with quantity, agreed price, quantity tolerance, and tax as a first-class attribute. It is the granular unit the 3-way/2-way match reconciles (PO line vs GRN vs invoice line) and the level at which GR/IR accrual, tax, and tolerance are evaluated.

fields.name: poId
fields.label: Purchase Order
fields.validation: set from the parent PO on create; immutable; line belongs to exactly one PO
fields.purpose: Binds the line to its order so the line value rolls up to PO value and so GRN, invoice, and match records that cite this line trace back to one order (the order spine at line granularity).

fields.name: itemId
fields.label: Item
fields.mandatoryCondition: type = item (free-text description used for service/maintenance lines)
fields.validation: ONBOARDED item or auto-created (Diagram 07); free-text description allowed for service/maintenance lines where no item master exists
fields.purpose: Names what is being ordered so the GRN can be matched to the right catalog item, HS code/duty classification flows through, and item-level spend and supplier-performance roll up; auto-create from a non-UUID requisition line keeps demand moving without a master-data block.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.purpose: The human-readable line text printed on the PO PDF and shown to the supplier; editable so order-specific wording (grade, packing, spec) can override the catalog default.

fields.name: quantity
fields.label: Quantity
fields.purpose: The ordered amount; the baseline the received quantity is matched against and the multiplier in the line taxable amount, GR/IR accrual, and the qty-over/qty-under match exceptions (axiom A8).

fields.name: unitOfMeasure
fields.label: Unit of Measure
fields.validation: a configured UoM master; defaults to the item purchase UoM
fields.purpose: Fixes the unit the quantity and price are expressed in so the GRN, invoice, and match compare like for like and so quantity tolerance is unambiguous.

fields.name: agreedPrice
fields.label: Agreed Price
fields.validation: >= 0; in PO currency; defaults to the awarded quotation line price
fields.purpose: The per-unit price committed to the supplier, traceable to the awarded quote; the price the invoice line is matched against, driving the price-variance match exception (axiom A8).

fields.name: tolerancePercent
fields.label: Quantity Tolerance %
fields.validation: +/- 5 to 10 typical for labels/cartons/printed PM; applies to received/invoiced quantity; 0 = exact
fields.purpose: Allows an agreed over/under-delivery band (printed packaging materials such as labels and cartons are produced in lots and rarely match exactly) so a within-band receipt auto-clears the match instead of raising a qty exception (axiom A8).

fields.name: taxCodeId
fields.label: Tax Code
fields.mandatoryCondition: jurisdiction requires a tax code (e.g. GST/VAT applies)
fields.validation: a configured TaxCode master (GST | VAT | duty | reverse-charge | withholding); reverse-charge applied for imports
fields.purpose: Makes tax a first-class line attribute (TaxType controlled vocabulary) so the rate, recoverability, and reverse-charge flag are known per line; this is what lets the 3-way match reconcile amounts including tax (axiom A8).

fields.name: taxableAmount
fields.label: Taxable Amount
fields.validation: = quantity x agreedPrice; in PO currency
fields.purpose: The pre-tax line base on which tax is levied; recomputed on any quantity/price edit and used as the taxable base in the match and the GR/IR accrual.

fields.name: taxAmount
fields.label: Tax Amount
fields.validation: = taxableAmount x taxCode.rate; reverse-charge for imports posts a notional/self-assessed amount
fields.purpose: The tax on the line, derived from the tax code rate, so the order carries tax explicitly; the match reconciles invoice tax against this and raises a tax-mismatch exception when they differ (axiom A8).

fields.name: lineValue
fields.label: Line Value
fields.purpose: The tax-inclusive total for the line; summed across lines to the PO value and reconciled in the match including tax.

invariants: A1 line bound to immutable PO number
A8 match reconciles amounts including line tax; within tolerance auto-clears else raises qty/price/tax exception
A12 line amounts normalized to base via FX for thresholds/analytics
A13 audit + SSE on every change
